case_title: CALIFORNIA STATE AUTOMOBILE ASSOCIATION vs. WOO, RICHARD AKA RICHARD Y. WOO

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC. 683.110 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WOO, RICHARD AKA RICHARD Y.
